name: L-GlutamateNADP+ oxidoreductase (transaminating)
justification: GOGAT, a secondary N-assimilation enzyme; the N-starvation-mimicry axis is already covered by the kept regulators (glnB/glnK/ntrB/nifA). Single-guide-feasible via the shared RPA0891 subunit, so available to restore if a metabolic N-lever is wanted.

name: benzoyl-CoA:acceptor oxidoreductase
justification: 4-hydroxybenzoyl-CoA reductase sits on the MAIN p-coumarate -> 4-HBA -> benzoyl-CoA catabolic route; repressing it cuts carbon SUPPLY rather than redirecting it (same logic that excludes the couAB feedstock ligase).

name: Isocitrate glyoxylate-lyase
justification: Glyoxylate-shunt entry. In R. palustris the glyoxylate shunt RETAINS the two acetyl-CoA carbons (avoids CO2 loss) and is the MAIN acetyl-CoA assimilation route; knocking it forces carbon into the CO2-losing lower TCA -> counterproductive for carbon-to-PHB, despite the FBA growth-coupling signal.

name: ATP synthase (four protons for one ATP)
justification: ATP synthase alpha; global energy-stress lever with ATP-burst/lethality risk and no model support. The AI itself flags it late-DBTL.

name: NADH dehydrogenase (ubiquinone-8  4 protons)
justification: Complex I; perturbing respiration is high-risk in CGA009, which obligately depends on CBB/RuBisCO as its electron sink (RuBisCO deletion is lethal photoheterotrophically). Redundant with FBA redox nodes.

name: NAD(P) transhydrogenase
justification: Transhydrogenase; redundant with the FBA-selected ferredoxin redox nodes (pyruvate:Fd oxidoreductase RPA4721 etc.), direction-dependent/uncertain, and redox-risky given CGA009's obligate CBB electron sink.

name: ATP:acetate phosphotransferase
justification: 2nd step of the pta-ackA overflow pathway; knocking pta (upstream) already closes the valve and pta is FBA+AI consensus (3 methods). A lone ackA KD is worse: cells accumulate toxic acetyl-phosphate and pick up suppressor mutations.
citation: Kim 2010 (ackA instability, PMC3008541); phosphotransacetylase = key PHB factor

name: Octanoyl-[acyl-carrier protein]malonyl-[acyl-carrier-protein]
justification: beta-ketoacyl-ACP synthase II (FAS elongation), downstream of ACC; redundant with accA (FBA+AI consensus, RPA0071).

name: Octanoyl-[acyl-carrier protein]malonyl-[acyl-carrier-protein]
justification: beta-ketoacyl-ACP synthase III (FAS initiation) is DOWNSTREAM of the committed ACC step; accA (kept) blocks the whole pathway and frees acetyl-CoA directly, so fabH adds nothing.

name: L-Glutamateammonia ligase (ADP-forming)
justification: GS function = 4 dispersed isozymes (GPR R00253 = RPA0984 or RPA1401 or RPA2967 or RPA4209); a single sgRNA on GlnA1 (RPA2967) leaves 3 GS genes and the cell shifts to GlnA2 for NH4+ assimilation, so single-guide CRISPRi cannot knock down GS activity. Cut on feasibility, not merit.
citation: Microbiol Spectr 11:e04953-22 (2023), doi:10.1128/spectrum.04953-22, PMID 36971559 (GlnA1 KO -> shift to GlnA2)
